title: pistolochia × hausmannii
intro: Pistolochia × hausmannii, also known as Hausmann's pistolochia, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the family Celastraceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Hausmann's pistolochia include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs. Hausmann's pistolochia can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are often used to alleviate various health conditions.
